source_pr.title: *: change standard "context" package to "golang.org/x/net/context"
source_pr.body: store/tikv should not use both "context" and "golang.org/x/net/context"

symptoms: // The test takes too long under the race detector.
failure_signature: // The test takes too long under the race detector.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: change standard "context" package to "golang.org/x/net/context".

evidence: evidence: // The test takes too long under the race detector.
